nodes.label: Operation Epic Fury
nodes.summary: Active major war involving US strikes on Tehran and Beirut and Iranian counter-strikes on Israel.

props.description: US-led military campaign against Iran and its proxies.

nodes.label: PLA Purge
nodes.summary: Ongoing internal purge of the Chinese Central Military Commission and Xi Jinping's inner circle.

props.description: Systemic removal of high-ranking military officials in China.

nodes.label: Ukraine Peace Process
nodes.summary: Stalled diplomatic efforts to resolve the conflict in Ukraine.

props.description: Diplomatic initiatives for Ukraine peace, currently deprioritized due to Middle East conflict.

nodes.label: US Senate War Powers Vote
nodes.summary: The US Senate defeated a resolution (47-53) to restrict President Trump's war powers on March 6, 2026.

props.content: Senate vote 47-53 against restricting war powers.

nodes.label: Tehran and Beirut Strikes
nodes.summary: Intensive US strikes on Tehran and Beirut, including a report of an elementary school being hit in Tehran.

props.content: US strikes on Iranian and Lebanese capitals.

nodes.label: Iranian Strikes on Israel
nodes.summary: Iranian cluster strikes reported over Tel Aviv and central Israel.

props.content: Iranian offensive actions against Israeli population centers.

nodes.label: CMC Vacancy Status
nodes.summary: 71% of China's Central Military Commission positions are currently vacant following purges.

nodes.label: Trump War Powers Authority
nodes.summary: President Trump has sufficient political cover to sustain the military campaign against Iran.

props.content: Senate resolution defeat signals political support for sustained campaign.

nodes.label: Iran Offensive Capability
nodes.summary: Iran retains significant offensive military capability despite ongoing US strikes.

props.content: Demonstrated by cluster strikes on central Israel.

nodes.label: Taiwan Operational Constraints
nodes.summary: The operational vacuum in the PLA command makes near-term military action against Taiwan technically difficult.

props.content: CMC vacancies hinder command and control for large-scale operations.

nodes.label: China Strategic Focus
nodes.summary: China is prioritizing domestic consolidation and the upcoming Trump-Xi summit over involvement in the US-Iran war.

props.content: China standing aside to focus on internal stability and March 31 summit.

nodes.label: Energy Export Halt Risk
nodes.summary: The US-Iran war could lead to a total halt of Gulf energy exports within weeks.

props.statement: War could halt energy exports within weeks.

nodes.label: Iran Regime Fall Prediction
nodes.summary: Market odds for the fall of the Iranian regime by June 30 have risen to 34 cents.

nodes.label: Tim Cook Departure Prediction
nodes.summary: Market odds for Tim Cook leaving Apple in 2027 have dropped to 29 cents.

nodes.label: China Taiwan Conflict Prediction
nodes.summary: Market odds for a China-Taiwan conflict in 2027 have decreased to 10.5 cents.

nodes.label: Russian Election Prediction
nodes.summary: Market odds for United Russia (UR) winning the election are at 78%.
